creator: test@eugeneweb.com
text:
Perhaps this should go in a separate bug report, though I believe this a 
minor bug from the patches submitted previously.

Same hardware as above, but with:

FreeBSD BSD10 10.0-RELEASE FreeBSD 10.0-RELEASE #0 r260789: Fri Jan 17 
01:46:25 UTC 2014

When there are dc cards in the system it rarely detects the native re 
nic on the mother board on boot. When it is detected it often crashes at 
the instant it prints the nic information line. Though that is hard to 
reproduce. I have attached dmesg and ifconfig output both with and 
without the dc quadport cards. What else would you like?

     Clif
